name: progress
invariants: output.ok === false || (typeof output.result.completed === 'number' && output.result.completed >= 0 && output.result.completed <= output.result.total)
_note: Per-user per-world progress view from globalThis._concordSTATE.expeditionJournalLens. The assassin runs with an internal owner actor, so {} returns ok:true (worldId defaults to concordia-hub, all stages incomplete — NEVER no_db). An unknown world returns ok:false 'unknown world: <id>'. completed never exceeds total; percent is 0..100.
